name: Impossible Rhubarb Streusel Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
16 oz Frozen rhubarb (thawed and drained)
3/4 c Milk
2 Eggs
1 tb Butter, softened
1 tsp Ground cinnamon
1 tsp Ground nutmeg
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Prepare Streusel Topping: Cut butter into the baking mix and brown sugar until crumbly; stir in nuts.
4. In a separate bowl, combine remaining ingredients (milk, eggs, butter, cinnamon, nutmeg) and whisk until smooth.
5. Pour the wet mixture into the pie plate with the rhubarb.
6. Sprinkle the Streusel Topping evenly over the filling.
7. Bake for 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve with sweetened whipped cream if desired.
Note: For high altitudes, increase baking time by 5-10 minutes and adjust ingredients as needed.
